decision_notes: name variant only — both sources agree on team identity (Tricia George + Robinson); 'David Robinson' is the canonical surname-form used by authoritative; 'Dave Robinson' is the same person via alias resolution (separate canonical-layer issue, not event-content conflict)

name spelling variant only — both sources agree on team (Constance Constable + Jenny D-something); authoritative spells 'Davison' consistently across two 1984 discipline entries (Women's Dbls Net p2 + Women's Freestyle p3); 'Jenny Davidson' in gemini matches a separate canonical person row — alias-resolution decision deferred to canonical layer

keep_survivor per Rule 3 (default to authoritative absent external contradiction). Both sources now agree Jodi Sebastian was on the team (via Chandler↔Sebastian alias resolution). Partner identity remains uncertain: authoritative names Shannon Storment (sole appearance in canonical), gemini names Shannon Aubin (multiple 1983-85 appearances). No primary source available to break the tie. Storment preserved to honor authoritative claim; reversible to use_doomed if Footbag World 1984, NHSA/WFA bulletin, or participant recollection surfaces favoring Aubin.

authoritative lists clean podium (Reynolds/George/Archdale, no ties); gemini source has data-quality artifacts in this discipline (Nancy Reynolds duplicated at p1, Trudy Archdale duplicated at p3) suggesting double-entry parsing error; gemini's Cheryl Hughes at p2 likely contamination from Women's Ultra Singles Net p2 (where Cheryl did finish 2nd per authoritative). keep_survivor
